style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="font-size: 8px; color: light-dark(rgb(111, 0, 0), rgb(255, 22, 22));"><i style="">threat:&nbsp; user could enter malicious script into input - potential xss attack</i></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="260" x="110" y="133" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FegNXPDfEaf44XCs3RDt-6" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="font-size: 8px; color: light-dark(rgb(111, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));"><i style="">mitigation:&nbsp; validate input form (eg. never allow .innerHtml&nbsp;</i></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="290" x="110" y="146" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FegNXPDfEaf44XCs3RDt-7" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;dashPattern=1 3;strokeWidth=2;rounded=0;fillColor=#a20025;strokeColor=light-dark(#6F0000,#FF1616);" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> <mxPoint x="460" y="333" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="260" y="333" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FegNXPDfEaf44XCs3RDt-8" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="font-size: 8px;"><i style="">trust boundary: mixed trust</i></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="100" x="470" y="302" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FegNXPDfEaf44XCs3RDt-9" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="font-size: 8px; color: light-dark(rgb(111, 0, 0), rgb(255, 22, 22));"><i style="">threat:&nbsp; MITM Attack -&gt; unauthorized user could&nbsp; get access to token</i></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="260" x="470" y="315" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FegNXPDfEaf44XCs3RDt-10" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="font-size: 8px; color: light-dark(rgb(111, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));"><i style="">mitigation:&nbsp; https (TLS 1.3) - creates encrypted tunnel so data stays confidential while crossing boundary</i></font><div><font style="font-size: 8px; color: light-dark(rgb(111, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));"><i style=""><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;secure headers to ensure =&gt; never talk to me on unencrypted connection<br></i></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="380" x="469" y="335" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FegNXPDfEaf44XCs3RDt-11" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;dashPattern=1 3;strokeWidth=2;rounded=0;fillColor=#a20025;strokeColor=light-dark(#6F0000,#FF1616);" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="430" y="653" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="430" y="823" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="430" y="483" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FegNXPDfEaf44XCs3RDt-12" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="font-size: 8px;"><i style="">trust boundary: controlled</i></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="100" x="380" y="823" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FegNXPDfEaf44XCs3RDt-13" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="font-size: 8px; color: light-dark(rgb(111, 0, 0), rgb(255, 22, 22));"><i style="">threat: Riots API is down (availability issue)&nbsp; or if server req is intercepted</i></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="280" x="380" y="835" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FegNXPDfEaf44XCs3RDt-14" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="font-size: 8px; color: light-dark(rgb(111, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));"><i style="">mitigation:&nbsp; set a strict timeout after a few seconds if Riot doesn't answer kill req</i></font><div><font style="font-size: 8px; color: light-dark(rgb(111, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));"><i style=""><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; server acting as secure proxy (stripping sensitive user data before sending req)<br></i></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 8px; color: light-dark(rgb(111, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));"><i style=""><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; server strictly validates Riot API res JSON before sending back to client<br></i></font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="43" width="380" x="380" y="854" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
